segments.text: YouTube to launch Create with AI, a program aimed at boosting skills in animation, visual effects, gaming,
comics, and extended reality in the AVGCXR sector. This initiative will offer workshops, webinars, and expert-led training for students and
creators, helping them master AIdriven tools for content creation. Beyond learning, there's funding support for projects that push the boundaries of AI
in creative media. IICT will also expand its YouTube channel with educational modules, making advanced creative skills accessible. across India, not just in major cities. This timing is critical.
India's AVGCXR sector is growing fast with increasing government and industry focus. So for aspiring creators, this
could be a golden opportunity to gain high quality skills and mentorship. For the industry, it means a stronger talent pool and original content at scale,
potentially positioning India as a global hub for creative technology.
